subsystems.POWER_UNIT: Honda RBPTH001 1.6L V6 Turbo Hybrid. MGU-K + MGU-H recovery systems.
subsystems.AERO_DYNAMICS: Ground effect venturi tunnels. DRAG REDUCTION SYSTEM (DRS). Blown diffuser.
subsystems.CHASSIS: Carbon-fibre composite monocoque with Halo cockpit protection system.
subsystems.STRATEGY: Negative tire degradation profile. High-fuel load optimization.
